summary: UI Redesign Testing Complete - Needs Attention (Director Intervention Console) and Coach Health sections verified. All 10 frontend tests PASSED. Backend API working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: NeedsAttentionCard.js: Clean implementation with category groups, three-line athlete rows, and contextual quick actions
CoachHealthCard.js: Well-structured coach management panel with status badges, workload bars, and activity signals
Both components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign for Needs Attention and Coach Health sections verified. Key features: (1) Needs Attention shows category card groups (Follow-Up Overdue, Ownership Gap, Momentum Drop, Blocker, Engagement Drop) with counts, (2) Three-line athlete rows with name (bold), problem description, colored impact statement, (3) Contextual quick actions on hover (Open Athlete + category-specific action), (4) Coach Health shows 3 coaches with Activating status badges (yellow), workload bars (High/Moderate/Light), activity signals, and action buttons (View Roster, Send Nudge, Reassign).

dashboard_kpis.details: 25 athletes, 5 coaches, 12 need attention, 5 events ahead, 0 unassigned

needs_attention_header.details: Shows 'NEEDS ATTENTION' with '8 issues across 8 athletes' summary

category_card_groups.details: 5 category groups found: Follow-Up Overdue (1), Ownership Gap (3), Momentum Drop (1), Blocker (1), Engagement Drop (2)

three_line_athlete_rows.details: Each row shows: Name (bold), Problem description, Impact statement (colored)

contextual_quick_actions.details: 18 quick action buttons found on hover: Open Athlete, Send Reminder, Assign Coach, Log Check-In, Request Document

coach_health_header.details: Shows 'COACH HEALTH' with '3 coaches · 23 athletes managed'

coach_cards.details: 3 coach cards with name, status badge, athletes count, workload bar, activity signal, action buttons

workload_signals.details: Coach Williams = 'High workload' (12 athletes), Coach Garcia = 'Moderate' (10), Coach Thompson Jr = 'Light' (1)

coach_status_badges.details: All coaches show 'Activating' status with yellow badge color

coach_action_buttons.details: All 3 coaches have View Roster, Send Nudge, Reassign buttons
